entry.title: IDC SAQMMA10D0017 (M028) awarded to CSRA LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO PROVIDE VISA SERVICES TO US EMBASSIES AND CONSULATES THROUGH THE ISSUANCE OF INDIVIDUAL TASK ORDERS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

entry.title: IDC SAQMMA10D0017 (P00032) awarded to CSRA LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: BUREAU OF CONSULAR AFFAIRS GLOBAL SUPPORT STRATEGY (GSS) INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY CONTRACT (IDIQ) IS AWARDED PURSUANT TO FAR PART 16. THE CONTRACT PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE IS ONE (1) BASE YEAR AND NINE (9) ONE YEAR OPTIONS. INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT TO PROVIDE GLOBAL SUPPORT STRATEGY (GSS) PROGRAM SERVICES FOR VISA-RELATED OPERATIONS AT U.S. EMBASSIES AND CONSULATES ABROAD. THIS ID/IQ HAS AN ESTABLISHED CEILING OF $2.8B OVER 10 YEARS OR APPROXIMATELY $280M PER YEAR.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
